name: Timur "Glaz" Glazkov
description:
|| Deceased.

In the abandoned Block 343, where time seemed to have stopped, there was an atmosphere of mystery and desolation. Among the crumbling walls and moldy corners, a story full of secrets and tragedies lurked. It was said that a young woman had passed away here 15 years ago, and since then, the place had become a magnet for rumors and fears.
creator: Kulya
